content:
Each group must write a false historical account and defend it as truth.
Interpret AI-generated poetry and determine its literary value.

✅ Why This Works:
• Encourages students to invest in the course direction.
• Ensures every session is dynamic and engaging.
• Ties into postmodern themes of shifting narratives & interactivity.

📖 6. Character Narrators for Each Section

📜 Each course section is now “hosted” by a literary character or author.
✔ Ties meta-structure into literary tradition.
✔ Provides an immersive and fun framing device.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 74 (chunk 74/555)
